name: Axe Beak

traits.name: Fire Aura
traits.text: At the end of each of the azer’s turns, each creature of the azer’s choice in a 5-foot Emanation originating from the azer takes 5 (1d10) Fire damage unless the azer has the Incapacitated condition.

traits.name: Illumination
traits.text: The azer sheds Bright Light in a 10-foot radius and Dim Light for an additional 10 feet.

text:
# Axe Beak

*Medium Elemental, Lawful Neutral*

### Actions

**Burning Hammer.** Melee Attack Roll: +5, reach 5 ft. Hit: 8 (1d10 + 3) Bludgeoning damage plus 3 (1d6) Fire damage.
